title: The Talon of Horus
author: aaron-dembski-bowden
description: In the wake of the Horus Heresy, the Sons of Horus are a Legion in ruins. Khayon, a sorcerer of the Thousand Sons, tells the story of how Abaddon the Despoiler rose from the ashes of defeat to forge the Black Legion — and the terrible price paid to build the instrument of Chaos's greatest champion.

title: Black Legion
author: aaron-dembski-bowden
description: Abaddon's Black Legion has become the mightiest warhost in the Eye of Terror, but to launch his Black Crusades against the Imperium he must unite the fractious warlords of Chaos under his banner. Khayon continues his account of his master's unstoppable rise to dominance.
